titles.title: All Things Working As He Has Planned

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: God knew me, before the world began, Back before time, God placd me in His hand, The thoughts of God eternal, manifested in this age, If you can see the thoughts of God, You'll see many things.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: You'll see many things, God wants you to see, For He has a plan for you and for me, So why be discouraged, God had you in His mind, All things are working as He has planned.

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: When troubles comes and things go wrong, And you don't know what to do, Remember in His Word He said, these things must happen to you, The Lord tries the righteous but He brings them safely through, For He has a plan for me and for you.
